coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across fifteen cases covering pixelation (including the empty endpoint), crop with zero and rounded fillets, full-color mode, density/structure extremes, and HSV/contrast controls. Grid exposes Blender's point-domain UV field and Image Texture performs linear CLIP sampling of the packed queen-of-swords image. A reproducible Blender 5.1.2 Eevee fixture now renders the packed authored material at 768x768. The gallery transfers img/dens/grid and uses Blender's PCG3D cell-corner/randomness semantics. Aligned evidence has 0.9949 surface-mask IoU, but 0.3033 binary-mask disagreement, 0.4277 macro luminance correlation, and -0.1040 mean-luminance delta; shader parity is therefore not claimed. Residuals include viewport filtering/sampling and may include Generated-coordinate or renderer-specific hash behavior.
